title: selaginella drepanophylla
intro: Selaginella drepanophylla, also known as the 'rattlesnake fern', is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant belonging to the genus Selaginella. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Selaginella drepanophylla include reducing inflammation, fighting against free radicals, and providing relief from pain and soreness. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal remedies such as tonics and salves.
